name: Moosewood Fudge Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Flour (3/4 cup for fudgier ones)
2 tbsp To 4 Tablespoons Strong black coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9x13 pan and preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Gently melt the chocolate and let it cool for about 10 minutes.
3. Cream the butter and sugar in a medium-sized bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Drizzle the melted chocolate into the mixture while stirring constantly. Once all the chocolate is incorporated, beat for an additional minute or two.
6. Mix in the flour and any optional embellishments until just combined.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
